rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOE LOUIE CELANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. Health and Safety Code section 103450 states a Petition to Establish Fact of Birth can be brought in the County in which the birth is alleged to have occurred, or in the County in which the person was domiciled at the date of death. This person was born in Merced County and died in Solano County. It is not clear on what basis this petition was filed in San Francisco County.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARY SARBO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. Health and Safety Code section 103450 states a Petition to Establish Fact of Birth can be brought in the County in which the birth is alleged to have occurred, or in the County in which the person was domiciled at the date of death. This person was born in Merced County and died in Merced County. It is not clear on what basis this petition was filed in San Francisco County.
